name: Honey Mustard Dressing#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 tsp of dry mustard powder with enough water to make it smooth.
2. Allow the mixture to sit for a few minutes until it opens your sinuses when you sniff it.
3. Add 2-3 tbsp of honey to vinegar and oil, then shake well until combined.
4. Vinegar and oil should be in roughly equal proportions as in a plain dressing (1:3 ratio).
